reasoning: With no search tools available to check current events as of the knowledge cutoff (November 9, 2025), I must rely on base rates and structural factors. Therefore, barring an already ongoing large-scale war, the probability of this occurring by year-end is exceptionally low. I am predicting at the absolute minimum practical threshold (0.02).
